name: Remediate Squad Role Coverage Gaps
description: Convert approved missing-role and role-coverage findings into a bounded hiring or artifact-remediation loop, then return a cleaner handoff to planning.

notes: Only remediate role-coverage gaps explicitly approved by AJ.
Route missing-persona work through reverse-interview and hiring-log discipline before execution handoff.
Keep artifact changes bounded to the roles and checkpoints approved for this loop.
Update planning report and planning JSONL state after approved remediation work.
